title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-20
body:
The moderation team has completed a review of 6 open reports. Here is a summary of outcomes:

BANS (2):
- spam_wave_42: Permanently banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner: Permanently banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

WARNINGS (3):
- bot_like_user_77: Warned for repeated near-identical automated-looking replies in help channels. Further automation abuse may result in a ban.
- new_member_17: Warned for an off-topic post in #introductions. No further action required at this time.
- trusted_helper: Received a precautionary warning related to a moderation dispute. This case has been escalated for human moderator review; no punitive action has been taken pending that review.

DISMISSED (1):
- report_006 (core_maintainer): Closed as a confirmed false positive. This report was the result of a coordinated brigading campaign following a moderation decision. No action was taken against the reported user. Coordinated false reporting is itself a violation of community rules.

We remain committed to a safe, welcoming community. Thank you to everyone who submits good-faith reports.
